MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $940 ARE TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Off Calendar Dec-13-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel for failure to appear at Early Settlemlent Conference is ordered off calendar/Motion Terminating Sanctions has been granted. Proceedings reported by: Maureen Howard, CSR# 7156. (212)

Ntc Of Mtn For An Order To Compel Plntfs' Compliance With Court Order Requiring Further Verified Responses To Form Interrogatories (Set One); Etc
Off Calendar Dec-11-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE STATED BY EITHER PARTY. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Paul Harper's motion for terminating sanctions is granted. The Court finds that further orders would not result in compliance. Order signed in open court. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-30-2007 Off Calendar

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-30-2007 Continued To Dec-13-07 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff for failure to appear at Early Settlement Conference is ordered continued to 12/13/2007 at 10:30 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Maureen Howard, CSR# 7156. (212)

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-18-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar/good cause. Proceedings reported by: Karen Farnswarth, CSR# 5162. (212)

MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Oct-16-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCE STATED. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.
1) Defendant Paul Harper's motion to compel further responses to form interrogatories is
Granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve supplemental verified responses without objections within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $540 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order.

2) Defendant's motion to compel responses to request for production of documents and request for statement of damages is Granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections within 15 days of notice of this order.

3) Defendant's motion to compel attendance at an independent medical examination and deposition is Granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to contact counsel for defendant within 15 days of notice of this order. The independent medical examination and deposition shall be completed on or before November 30, 2007. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $940 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-05-2007 Set For Trial On Dec-17-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Dec-03-07 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 303

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
